name: Followups: Win Back

description.en: Reach out to an inactive customer with a personalized win-back message and optional offer.
description.de: Einen inaktiven Kunden mit einer personalisierten Win-back-Nachricht und optionalem Angebot kontaktieren.
description.fr: Contacter un client inactif avec un message de reconquete personnalise et une offre optionnelle.
description.es: Contactar a un cliente inactivo con un mensaje personalizado de recuperacion y una oferta opcional.
description.ro: Contacteaza un client inactiv cu un mesaj personalizat de recuperare si o oferta optionala.

bot: When this warp is triggered: fetches the contact, composes a personalized win-back message, and sends it via WhatsApp.

inputs.name: Contact
inputs.bot: The contact ID of the inactive customer to reach out to.

inputs.name: Days Inactive

description.en: How many days since their last visit?
description.de: Wie viele Tage seit dem letzten Besuch?
description.fr: Combien de jours depuis leur derniere visite ?
description.es: Cuantos dias desde su ultima visita?
description.ro: Cate zile de la ultima vizita?

inputs.bot: Number of days since the customer's last visit. Used to personalize the win-back message.

inputs.name: Offer

description.en: Optional coupon or discount to include
description.fr: Coupon ou reduction optionnel a inclure
description.es: Cupon o descuento opcional a incluir
description.ro: Cupon sau reducere optionala de inclus

inputs.bot: Optional incentive to include in the win-back message, such as a discount or coupon code.

actions.prompt: Compose a warm, personalized win-back message in German (du-form) for {{CONTACT_NAME}} who hasn't visited in {{daysInactive}} days. If an offer is provided, include it naturally: {{offer}}
